---
title: "LaTeX Preview"
toc: false
sidebar: false
show-reading-time: false
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Nunito:wght@400;600;700&family=PT+Sans:wght@400;700&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap');
body { font-family: 'PT Sans', sans-serif; }
h1, h2, h3, h4 { font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif; }
.page-columns .content { max-width: 95% !important; width: 95% !important; margin: 0 auto !important; }
.column-page, .column-screen, .column-body { max-width: 95% !important; margin: 0 auto !important; }
#quarto-margin-sidebar, #quarto-sidebar, .margin-sidebar { display: none !important; }
.page-columns { grid-template-columns: 1fr !important; display: block !important; }
#quarto-content { padding-left: 0 !important; margin-left: 0 !important; }
main.content { margin-left: auto !important; margin-right: auto !important; padding-top: 1.5em !important; }

.latex-container {
  max-width: 100%;
  width: 100%;
  margin: 0 auto;
}

/* Toolbar */
.latex-toolbar {
  display: flex;
  gap: 8px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
  align-items: center;
}

.toolbar-btn {
  padding: 6px 12px;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  border: 1.5px solid var(--bs-border-color, #ddd);
  border-radius: 6px;
  background: var(--bs-secondary-bg, #f8f9fa);
  color: var(--bs-body-color, #333);
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.15s;
}

.toolbar-btn:hover {
  border-color: var(--bs-primary, #22176F);
  background: #eef;
}

.toolbar-btn.active {
  background: var(--bs-primary, #22176F);
  color: #fff;
  border-color: var(--bs-primary, #22176F);
}

.toolbar-separator {
  width: 1px;
  height: 24px;
  background: var(--bs-border-color, #ddd);
  margin: 0 4px;
}

/* Editor area */
.editor-wrapper {
  display: flex;
  margin-bottom: 16px;
  min-height: 500px;
  height: 60vh;
  border: 1.5px solid var(--bs-border-color, #ddd);
  border-radius: 10px;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.editor-pane {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  min-width: 200px;
  flex: 1;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.preview-pane {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  min-width: 200px;
  flex: 1;
  overflow: hidden;
  border-left: 1px solid var(--bs-border-color, #ddd);
}

/* Resize handle between panes */
.resize-handle {
  width: 8px;
  cursor: col-resize;
  background: var(--bs-secondary-bg, #f0f0f0);
  border-left: 1px solid var(--bs-border-color, #ddd);
  border-right: 1px solid var(--bs-border-color, #ddd);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  transition: background 0.15s;
  user-select: none;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.resize-handle:hover, .resize-handle.dragging {
  background: var(--bs-primary, #22176F);
}

.resize-handle::after {
  content: '⋮';
  color: #999;
  font-size: 16px;
  line-height: 1;
}

.resize-handle:hover::after, .resize-handle.dragging::after {
  color: #fff;
}

.pane-header {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 8px 14px;
  background: var(--bs-secondary-bg, #f5f5f5);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--bs-border-color, #ddd);
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--bs-body-color, #555);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.pane-header .pane-actions {
  display: flex;
  gap: 6px;
  align-items: center;
}

.pane-header .pane-actions button {
  padding: 3px 8px;
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--bs-border-color, #ccc);
  border-radius: 4px;
  background: #fff;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.15s;
}

.pane-header .pane-actions button:hover {
  background: var(--bs-primary, #22176F);
  color: #fff;
  border-color: var(--bs-primary, #22176F);
}

/* Language selector */
.lang-selector {
  padding: 3px 8px;
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--bs-border-color, #ccc);
  border-radius: 4px;
  background: #fff;
  color: var(--bs-body-color, #333);
  cursor: pointer;
  font-weight: 500;
}

.lang-selector:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--bs-primary, #22176F); }

/* CodeMirror overrides */
.cm-wrap {
  flex: 1;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.cm-wrap .CodeMirror {
  height: 100%;
  font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

/* Preview pane */
#latex-preview {
  flex: 1;
  padding: 20px;
  background: #fff;
  color: #000;
  overflow: auto;
  font-size: 1.1rem;
  line-height: 1.8;
}

/* Bottom resize handle for total height */
.v-resize-handle {
  height: 8px;
  cursor: row-resize;
  background: var(--bs-secondary-bg, #f0f0f0);
  border: 1px solid var(--bs-border-color, #ddd);
  border-top: none;
  border-radius: 0 0 10px 10px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  transition: background 0.15s;
  user-select: none;
  margin-bottom: 16px;
}

.v-resize-handle:hover { background: var(--bs-primary, #22176F); }
.v-resize-handle::after { content: '⋯'; color: #999; font-size: 12px; }
.v-resize-handle:hover::after { color: #fff; }

/* Symbol palette */
.symbol-palette {
  margin-bottom: 16px;
  border: 1.5px solid var(--bs-border-color, #ddd);
  border-radius: 10px;
  overflow: hidden;
  display: none;
}
.symbol-palette.visible { display: block; }

.symbol-tabs {
  display: flex;
  gap: 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--bs-border-color, #ddd);
  background: var(--bs-secondary-bg, #f5f5f5);
  overflow-x: auto;
}

.symbol-tab {
  padding: 8px 14px;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  cursor: pointer;
  border: none;
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--bs-body-color, #555);
  white-space: nowrap;
  transition: all 0.15s;
  border-bottom: 2px solid transparent;
}
.symbol-tab:hover { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.03); }
.symbol-tab.active {
  color: var(--bs-primary, #22176F);
  border-bottom-color: var(--bs-primary, #22176F);
  background: var(--bs-body-bg, #fff);
}

.symbol-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(48px, 1fr));
  gap: 4px;
  padding: 12px;
  max-height: 180px;
  overflow-y: auto;
}

.symbol-btn {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  padding: 6px 4px;
  border: 1px solid transparent;
  border-radius: 6px;
  background: transparent;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-size: 1.1rem;
  transition: all 0.15s;
  position: relative;
}
.symbol-btn:hover {
  background: var(--bs-secondary-bg, #f0f0f0);
  border-color: var(--bs-border-color, #ddd);
}
.symbol-btn .sym-label {
  font-size: 0.6rem;
  color: #999;
  margin-top: 2px;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  max-width: 100%;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.symbol-btn[data-tooltip]:hover::after {
  content: attr(data-tooltip);
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 100%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  background: #333;
  color: #fff;
  padding: 3px 8px;
  border-radius: 4px;
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  white-space: nowrap;
  z-index: 100;
}

/* Templates panel */
.templates-panel {
  margin-bottom: 16px;
  border: 1.5px solid var(--bs-border-color, #ddd);
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 16px;
  background: var(--bs-secondary-bg, #f9f9f9);
  display: none;
}
.templates-panel.visible { display: block; }

.templates-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(200px, 1fr));
  gap: 10px;
  margin-top: 10px;
}

.template-card {
  padding: 12px;
  border: 1.5px solid var(--bs-border-color, #ddd);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--bs-body-bg, #fff);
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.15s;
}
.template-card:hover {
  border-color: var(--bs-primary, #22176F);
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
  transform: translateY(-1px);
}
.template-card h4 { margin: 0 0 4px 0; font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--bs-primary, #22176F); }
.template-card p { margin: 0; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #777; }

/* Status bar */
.status-bar {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 6px 14px;
  background: var(--bs-secondary-bg, #f5f5f5);
  border: 1px solid var(--bs-border-color, #ddd);
  border-radius: 8px;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  color: #666;
}
.status-bar .status-left { display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: center; }
.status-bar .status-right { display: flex; gap: 10px; align-items: center; }
.status-indicator { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; }
.status-dot { width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%; background: #4caf50; }
.status-dot.error { background: #f44336; }

/* Export panel */
.export-panel {
  margin-top: 16px;
  border: 1.5px solid var(--bs-border-color, #ddd);
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 16px;
  background: var(--bs-secondary-bg, #f9f9f9);
  display: none;
}
.export-panel.visible { display: block; }
.export-options { display: flex; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-top: 10px; }
.export-btn {
  padding: 10px 18px;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  border: 1.5px solid var(--bs-border-color, #ddd);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--bs-body-bg, #fff);
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.15s;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
}
.export-btn:hover { border-color: var(--bs-primary, #22176F); background: #eef; }

/* Error log */
.error-log {
  margin-top: 10px;
  padding: 10px 14px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: #fff5f5;
  border: 1px solid #ffcccc;
  color: #cc0000;
  font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  display: none;
  max-height: 120px;
  overflow-y: auto;
}
.error-log.visible { display: block; }

/* Fullscreen */
.fullscreen-overlay {
  display: none; position: fixed; inset: 0;
  background: var(--bs-body-bg, #fff);
  z-index: 9999; padding: 20px; overflow: auto;
}
.fullscreen-overlay.active { display: block; }
.fullscreen-close {
  position: fixed; top: 16px; right: 16px;
  padding: 8px 14px; border-radius: 6px;
  border: 1.5px solid #ddd; background: #f5f5f5;
  font-size: 0.85rem; cursor: pointer; z-index: 10000;
}

@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
  #latex-preview { background: #fff; color: #000; }
}
</style>

<p>A full-featured LaTeX editor with live preview, syntax highlighting, language detection, resizable panes, symbol palette, templates, and export. Everything runs locally in your browser.</p>

<div class="latex-container">

<!-- Toolbar -->
<div class="latex-toolbar">
  <button class="toolbar-btn" onclick="togglePanel('symbols')" id="btn-symbols">⌨️ Symbols</button>
  <button class="toolbar-btn" onclick="togglePanel('templates')" id="btn-templates">📄 Templates</button>
  <div class="toolbar-separator"></div>
  <button class="toolbar-btn" onclick="insertSnippet('\\textbf{', '}')"><b>B</b></button>
  <button class="toolbar-btn" onclick="insertSnippet('\\textit{', '}')"><i>I</i></button>
  <button class="toolbar-btn" onclick="insertSnippet('\\underline{', '}')"><u>U</u></button>
  <button class="toolbar-btn" onclick="insertSnippet('\\texttt{', '}')">Tt</button>
  <div class="toolbar-separator"></div>
  <button class="toolbar-btn" onclick="insertSnippet('\\frac{', '}{}')">&frac12;</button>
  <button class="toolbar-btn" onclick="insertSnippet('\\sqrt{', '}')">√</button>
  <button class="toolbar-btn" onclick="insertSnippet('\\sum_{', '}^{}')">∑</button>
  <button class="toolbar-btn" onclick="insertSnippet('\\int_{', '}^{}')">∫</button>
  <button class="toolbar-btn" onclick="insertSnippet('\\lim_{', ' \\to }')">lim</button>
  <div class="toolbar-separator"></div>
  <button class="toolbar-btn" onclick="insertSnippet('\\begin{align}\n', '\n\\end{align}')">align</button>
  <button class="toolbar-btn" onclick="insertSnippet('\\begin{cases}\n', '\n\\end{cases}')">cases</button>
  <button class="toolbar-btn" onclick="insertSnippet('\\begin{bmatrix}\n', '\n\\end{bmatrix}')">matrix</button>
  <div class="toolbar-separator"></div>
  <button class="toolbar-btn" onclick="toggleExport()" id="btn-export">📤 Export</button>
  <button class="toolbar-btn" onclick="toggleFullscreen()">⛶ Fullscreen</button>
</div>

<!-- Symbol Palette -->
<div class="symbol-palette" id="symbol-palette">
  <div class="symbol-tabs" id="symbol-tabs"></div>
  <div class="symbol-grid" id="symbol-grid"></div>
</div>

<!-- Templates Panel -->
<div class="templates-panel" id="templates-panel">
  <strong>Document Templates</strong>
  <p style="font-size:0.8rem;color:#777;margin:4px 0 0 0;">Click a template to load it into the editor</p>
  <div class="templates-grid" id="templates-grid"></div>
</div>

<!-- Editor + Preview with resize handle -->
<div class="editor-wrapper" id="editor-wrapper">
  <div class="editor-pane" id="editor-pane">
    <div class="pane-header">
      <span>📝 Editor</span>
      <div class="pane-actions">
        <select class="lang-selector" id="lang-selector" onchange="switchLanguage(this.value)">
          <option value="stex">LaTeX</option>
          <option value="markdown">Markdown / QMD</option>
          <option value="htmlmixed">HTML</option>
          <option value="xml">XML</option>
          <option value="javascript">JavaScript</option>
          <option value="python">Python</option>
          <option value="css">CSS</option>
          <option value="yaml">YAML</option>
          <option value="text/plain">Plain Text</option>
        </select>
        <button onclick="clearEditor()">Clear</button>
        <button onclick="copySource()">Copy</button>
        <button onclick="formatLatex()">Format</button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="cm-wrap" id="cm-wrap"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="resize-handle" id="resize-handle"></div>
  <div class="preview-pane" id="preview-pane">
    <div class="pane-header">
      <span>👁️ Preview</span>
      <div class="pane-actions">
        <button onclick="copyPreviewHTML()">Copy HTML</button>
        <button onclick="printPreview()">Print</button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div id="latex-preview">
      <span style="color:#aaa;">Live preview will appear here...</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Bottom resize handle -->
<div class="v-resize-handle" id="v-resize-handle"></div>

<!-- Error Log -->
<div class="error-log" id="error-log"></div>

<!-- Export Panel -->
<div class="export-panel" id="export-panel">
  <strong>Export Options</strong>
  <div class="export-options">
    <button class="export-btn" onclick="exportPNG()">🖼️ PNG Image</button>
    <button class="export-btn" onclick="exportSVG()">📐 SVG Vector</button>
    <button class="export-btn" onclick="exportPDF()">📃 PDF Document</button>
    <button class="export-btn" onclick="exportHTML()">🌐 Standalone HTML</button>
    <button class="export-btn" onclick="exportMarkdown()">📝 Markdown</button>
    <button class="export-btn" onclick="copyMathML()">🧮 MathML (Office)</button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Status Bar -->
<div class="status-bar">
  <div class="status-left">
    <span class="status-indicator"><span class="status-dot" id="status-dot"></span> <span id="status-text">Ready</span></span>
    <span id="char-count">0 chars</span>
    <span id="line-count">1 line</span>
    <span id="detected-lang" style="color:var(--bs-primary,#22176F);font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;" onclick="applyDetectedLang()" title="Click to apply detected language"></span>
  </div>
  <div class="status-right">
    <span id="cursor-pos">Ln 1, Col 1</span>
    <span>KaTeX + CodeMirror</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Fullscreen Overlay -->
<div class="fullscreen-overlay" id="fullscreen-overlay">
  <button class="fullscreen-close" onclick="toggleFullscreen()">✕ Close</button>
  <div id="fullscreen-preview" style="padding: 40px 60px; font-size: 1.2rem; line-height: 2;"></div>
</div>

</div>

<!-- CodeMirror 5 CSS and JS from CDN -->
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/codemirror@5.65.16/lib/codemirror.min.css">
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/codemirror@5.65.16/addon/fold/foldgutter.css">
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/codemirror@5.65.16/lib/codemirror.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/codemirror@5.65.16/mode/stex/stex.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/codemirror@5.65.16/mode/markdown/markdown.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/codemirror@5.65.16/mode/xml/xml.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/codemirror@5.65.16/mode/htmlmixed/htmlmixed.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/codemirror@5.65.16/mode/javascript/javascript.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/codemirror@5.65.16/mode/python/python.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/codemirror@5.65.16/mode/css/css.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/codemirror@5.65.16/mode/yaml/yaml.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/codemirror@5.65.16/addon/edit/matchbrackets.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/codemirror@5.65.16/addon/edit/closebrackets.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/codemirror@5.65.16/addon/fold/foldcode.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/codemirror@5.65.16/addon/fold/foldgutter.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/codemirror@5.65.16/addon/fold/brace-fold.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/codemirror@5.65.16/addon/selection/active-line.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/codemirror@5.65.16/addon/search/search.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/codemirror@5.65.16/addon/search/searchcursor.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/codemirror@5.65.16/addon/dialog/dialog.min.js"></script>
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/codemirror@5.65.16/addon/dialog/dialog.css">

<script>
// === Global state ===
var cm; // CodeMirror instance
var currentLang = 'stex';
var debounceTimer = null;
var preview = document.getElementById('latex-preview');
var errorLog = document.getElementById('error-log');
var statusDot = document.getElementById('status-dot');
var statusText = document.getElementById('status-text');

// === Language detection ===
function detectLanguage(text) {
  var t = text.trim().substring(0, 2000);
  if (/\\(documentclass|usepackage|begin\{|section\{|frac\{|textbf\{|maketitle)/.test(t)) return 'stex';
  if (/^\s*\\/.test(t) && /\{.*\}/.test(t) && /\$[^$]+\$/.test(t)) return 'stex';
  if (/^---\s*\n[\s\S]*?\n---/.test(t) || /```\{/.test(t)) return 'markdown';
  if (/^#{1,6}\s/m.test(t) && !/\\begin/.test(t)) return 'markdown';
  if (/<!DOCTYPE|<html|<head|<body|<div|<script/i.test(t)) return 'htmlmixed';
  if (/<[a-z][a-z0-9]*[\s>]/i.test(t) && /<\/[a-z]/i.test(t)) return 'htmlmixed';
  if (/^<\?xml/.test(t)) return 'xml';
  if (/^\s*[\[{]/.test(t) && /[}\]]\s*$/.test(t.slice(-100))) return 'javascript';
  if (/^[a-z_][a-z0-9_]*\s*:/im.test(t) && !/[{;]/.test(t.substring(0, 200))) return 'yaml';
  if (/\b(const|let|var|function|import|export|=>)\b/.test(t)) return 'javascript';
  if (/\b(def |class |import |from |print\()\b/.test(t)) return 'python';
  if (/[.#][a-z][\w-]*\s*\{|@media|@import/.test(t)) return 'css';
  return 'stex';
}

function switchLanguage(lang) {
  currentLang = lang;
  cm.setOption('mode', lang);
  document.getElementById('detected-lang').textContent = '';
}

function applyDetectedLang() {
  var content = cm.getValue();
  var detected = detectLanguage(content);
  document.getElementById('lang-selector').value = detected;
  switchLanguage(detected);
}

// === Initialize CodeMirror 5 ===
function initEditor(content) {
  cm = CodeMirror(document.getElementById('cm-wrap'), {
    value: content,
    mode: currentLang,
    lineNumbers: true,
    matchBrackets: true,
    autoCloseBrackets: true,
    styleActiveLine: true,
    foldGutter: true,
    gutters: ['CodeMirror-linenumbers', 'CodeMirror-foldgutter'],
    lineWrapping: true,
    tabSize: 2,
    indentWithTabs: false,
    theme: 'default',
    extraKeys: {
      'Tab': function(cm) {
        cm.replaceSelection('  ', 'end');
      },
      'Ctrl-Enter': function() { renderPreview(); }
    }
  });

  cm.on('change', function() {
    clearTimeout(debounceTimer);
    debounceTimer = setTimeout(function() {
      renderPreview();
      updateStatus();
      saveToStorage();
      // Auto-detect language
      var detected = detectLanguage(cm.getValue());
      var selector = document.getElementById('lang-selector');
      if (detected !== selector.value) {
        document.getElementById('detected-lang').textContent = '(detected: ' + langLabel(detected) + ' — click to apply)';
      } else {
        document.getElementById('detected-lang').textContent = '';
      }
    }, 200);
  });

  cm.on('cursorActivity', function() {
    var cursor = cm.getCursor();
    document.getElementById('cursor-pos').textContent = 'Ln ' + (cursor.line + 1) + ', Col ' + (cursor.ch + 1);
  });
}

function langLabel(mode) {
  var labels = {stex:'LaTeX', markdown:'Markdown', htmlmixed:'HTML', xml:'XML', javascript:'JavaScript', python:'Python', css:'CSS', yaml:'YAML'};
  return labels[mode] || mode;
}

// === Resize handles ===
(function() {
  // Horizontal resize
  var handle = document.getElementById('resize-handle');
  var wrapper = document.getElementById('editor-wrapper');
  var editorPane = document.getElementById('editor-pane');
  var previewPane = document.getElementById('preview-pane');
  var dragging = false;

  handle.addEventListener('mousedown', function(e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    dragging = true;
    handle.classList.add('dragging');
    document.body.style.cursor = 'col-resize';
    document.body.style.userSelect = 'none';

    var wrapperRect = wrapper.getBoundingClientRect();

    function onMove(ev) {
      if (!dragging) return;
      var x = ev.clientX - wrapperRect.left;
      var total = wrapperRect.width;
      var pct = Math.max(15, Math.min(85, (x / total) * 100));
      editorPane.style.flex = 'none';
      editorPane.style.width = pct + '%';
      previewPane.style.flex = 'none';
      previewPane.style.width = (100 - pct) + '%';
      cm.refresh();
    }
    function onUp() {
      dragging = false;
      handle.classList.remove('dragging');
      document.body.style.cursor = '';
      document.body.style.userSelect = '';
      document.removeEventListener('mousemove', onMove);
      document.removeEventListener('mouseup', onUp);
    }
    document.addEventListener('mousemove', onMove);
    document.addEventListener('mouseup', onUp);
  });

  // Touch support for horizontal resize
  handle.addEventListener('touchstart', function(e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    dragging = true;
    handle.classList.add('dragging');
    var wrapperRect = wrapper.getBoundingClientRect();

    function onMove(ev) {
      if (!dragging) return;
      var x = ev.touches[0].clientX - wrapperRect.left;
      var total = wrapperRect.width;
      var pct = Math.max(15, Math.min(85, (x / total) * 100));
      editorPane.style.flex = 'none';
      editorPane.style.width = pct + '%';
      previewPane.style.flex = 'none';
      previewPane.style.width = (100 - pct) + '%';
      cm.refresh();
    }
    function onEnd() {
      dragging = false;
      handle.classList.remove('dragging');
      document.removeEventListener('touchmove', onMove);
      document.removeEventListener('touchend', onEnd);
    }
    document.addEventListener('touchmove', onMove);
    document.addEventListener('touchend', onEnd);
  });

  // Vertical resize
  var vHandle = document.getElementById('v-resize-handle');
  vHandle.addEventListener('mousedown', function(e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    var startY = e.clientY;
    var startH = wrapper.getBoundingClientRect().height;
    document.body.style.cursor = 'row-resize';
    document.body.style.userSelect = 'none';

    function onMove(ev) {
      var dy = ev.clientY - startY;
      var newH = Math.max(300, startH + dy);
      wrapper.style.height = newH + 'px';
      wrapper.style.minHeight = newH + 'px';
      cm.refresh();
    }
    function onUp() {
      document.body.style.cursor = '';
      document.body.style.userSelect = '';
      document.removeEventListener('mousemove', onMove);
      document.removeEventListener('mouseup', onUp);
    }
    document.addEventListener('mousemove', onMove);
    document.addEventListener('mouseup', onUp);
  });
})();

// === Editor actions ===
function insertSnippet(before, after) {
  if (!cm) return;
  var sel = cm.getSelection();
  cm.replaceSelection(before + sel + after);
  var cursor = cm.getCursor();
  cm.setCursor(cursor);
  cm.focus();
  renderPreview();
}

function clearEditor() {
  if (cm.getValue() && !confirm('Clear all content?')) return;
  cm.setValue('');
  renderPreview();
}

function copySource() {
  navigator.clipboard.writeText(cm.getValue()).then(function() {
    statusText.textContent = '✓ Source copied!';
    setTimeout(function() { statusText.textContent = 'Ready'; }, 2000);
  });
}

function formatLatex() {
  var lines = cm.getValue().split('\n');
  var formatted = [];
  var indent = 0;
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    var line = lines[i].trim();
    if (line.match(/^\\end\{/)) indent = Math.max(0, indent - 1);
    formatted.push('  '.repeat(indent) + line);
    if (line.match(/^\\begin\{/) && !line.match(/\\end\{/)) indent++;
  }
  cm.setValue(formatted.join('\n'));
  renderPreview();
}

function copyPreviewHTML() {
  navigator.clipboard.writeText(preview.innerHTML).then(function() {
    statusText.textContent = '✓ HTML copied!';
    setTimeout(function() { statusText.textContent = 'Ready'; }, 2000);
  });
}

function printPreview() {
  var win = window.open('', '_blank');
  win.document.write('<html><head><title>LaTeX Preview</title>');
  win.document.write('<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.16.9/dist/katex.min.css">');
  win.document.write('<style>body{font-family:serif;max-width:800px;margin:40px auto;padding:20px;line-height:1.8;}</style>');
  win.document.write('</head><body>');
  win.document.write(preview.innerHTML);
  win.document.write('</body></html>');
  win.document.close();
  win.print();
}

function updateStatus() {
  var text = cm.getValue();
  document.getElementById('char-count').textContent = text.length + ' chars';
  document.getElementById('line-count').textContent = cm.lineCount() + ' lines';
}

// === Panel toggles ===
function togglePanel(name) {
  var panel;
  if (name === 'symbols') panel = document.getElementById('symbol-palette');
  else panel = document.getElementById(name + '-panel');
  var btn = document.getElementById('btn-' + name);
  panel.classList.toggle('visible');
  btn.classList.toggle('active');
}

function toggleExport() {
  document.getElementById('export-panel').classList.toggle('visible');
  document.getElementById('btn-export').classList.toggle('active');
}

function toggleFullscreen() {
  var overlay = document.getElementById('fullscreen-overlay');
  overlay.classList.toggle('active');
  if (overlay.classList.contains('active')) {
    document.getElementById('fullscreen-preview').innerHTML = preview.innerHTML;
    document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
  } else {
    document.body.style.overflow = '';
  }
}

// === Export functions ===
function exportPNG() {
  if (typeof html2canvas === 'undefined') {
    var script = document.createElement('script');
    script.src = 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/html2canvas@1.4.1/dist/html2canvas.min.js';
    document.head.appendChild(script);
    script.onload = function() { doExportPNG(); };
  } else {
    doExportPNG();
  }
}
function doExportPNG() {
  html2canvas(preview, { backgroundColor: '#ffffff', scale: 3 }).then(function(canvas) {
    canvas.toBlob(function(blob) {
      var url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
      var a = document.createElement('a');
      a.href = url; a.download = 'latex-preview.png'; a.click();
      URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
      statusText.textContent = '⬇ PNG downloaded';
      setTimeout(function() { statusText.textContent = 'Ready'; }, 2000);
    });
  });
}

function exportSVG() {
  var svgContent = '<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="800" height="600">' +
    '<foreignObject width="100%" height="100%">' +
    '<div xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" style="font-family:serif;padding:20px;line-height:1.8;">' +
    '<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.16.9/dist/katex.min.css"/>' +
    preview.innerHTML + '</div></foreignObject></svg>';
  var blob = new Blob([svgContent], { type: 'image/svg+xml' });
  var url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  var a = document.createElement('a');
  a.href = url; a.download = 'latex-preview.svg'; a.click();
  URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
  statusText.textContent = '⬇ SVG downloaded';
  setTimeout(function() { statusText.textContent = 'Ready'; }, 2000);
}

function exportPDF() {
  var win = window.open('', '_blank');
  win.document.write('<html><head><title>LaTeX Document</title>');
  win.document.write('<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.16.9/dist/katex.min.css">');
  win.document.write('<style>@page{margin:2.5cm;}body{font-family:serif;line-height:1.8;font-size:12pt;}</style>');
  win.document.write('</head><body>');
  win.document.write(preview.innerHTML);
  win.document.write('<script>setTimeout(function(){window.print();},500);<\/script>');
  win.document.write('</body></html>');
  win.document.close();
}

function exportHTML() {
  var h = '<!DOCTYPE html>\n<html>\n<head>\n<meta charset="utf-8">\n<title>LaTeX Document</title>\n';
  h += '<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.16.9/dist/katex.min.css">\n';
  h += '<style>body{font-family:serif;max-width:800px;margin:40px auto;padding:20px;line-height:1.8;}</style>\n';
  h += '</head>\n<body>\n' + preview.innerHTML + '\n</body>\n</html>';
  var blob = new Blob([h], { type: 'text/html' });
  var url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  var a = document.createElement('a');
  a.href = url; a.download = 'latex-document.html'; a.click();
  URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
  statusText.textContent = '⬇ HTML downloaded';
  setTimeout(function() { statusText.textContent = 'Ready'; }, 2000);
}

function exportMarkdown() {
  var md = cm.getValue();
  md = md.replace(/\\section\*?\{([^}]*)\}/g, '## $1');
  md = md.replace(/\\subsection\*?\{([^}]*)\}/g, '### $1');
  md = md.replace(/\\subsubsection\*?\{([^}]*)\}/g, '#### $1');
  md = md.replace(/\\textbf\{([^}]*)\}/g, '**$1**');
  md = md.replace(/\\textit\{([^}]*)\}/g, '*$1*');
  md = md.replace(/\\texttt\{([^}]*)\}/g, '`$1`');
  md = md.replace(/\\item\s*/g, '- ');
  md = md.replace(/\\begin\{(itemize|enumerate)\}/g, '');
  md = md.replace(/\\end\{(itemize|enumerate)\}/g, '');
  navigator.clipboard.writeText(md).then(function() {
    statusText.textContent = '✓ Markdown copied!';
    setTimeout(function() { statusText.textContent = 'Ready'; }, 2000);
  });
}

function copyMathML() {
  var source = cm.getValue();
  var match = /\$([^$]+)\$/.exec(source);
  if (match && typeof katex !== 'undefined') {
    try {
      var mml = katex.renderToString(match[1], { output: 'mathml', throwOnError: false });
      navigator.clipboard.writeText(mml);
      statusText.textContent = '✓ MathML copied!';
    } catch(e) { statusText.textContent = '✗ Error converting'; }
  } else {
    statusText.textContent = 'No math found';
  }
  setTimeout(function() { statusText.textContent = 'Ready'; }, 2000);
}

// === KaTeX and rendering ===
(function loadKaTeX() {
  var link = document.createElement('link');
  link.rel = 'stylesheet';
  link.href = 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.16.9/dist/katex.min.css';
  document.head.appendChild(link);

  var script = document.createElement('script');
  script.src = 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.16.9/dist/katex.min.js';
  script.onload = function() {
    renderPreview();
  };
  document.head.appendChild(script);
})();

function renderPreview() {
  if (typeof katex === 'undefined') return;
  var source = cm ? cm.getValue().trim() : '';
  if (!source) {
    preview.innerHTML = '<span style="color:#aaa;">Live preview will appear here...</span>';
    errorLog.classList.remove('visible');
    statusDot.className = 'status-dot';
    statusText.textContent = 'Ready';
    return;
  }

  var errors = [];
  var html = processLatex(source, errors);

  if (errors.length > 0) {
    errorLog.innerHTML = errors.map(function(e) { return '⚠ ' + e; }).join('<br>');
    errorLog.classList.add('visible');
    statusDot.className = 'status-dot error';
    statusText.textContent = errors.length + ' warning(s)';
  } else {
    errorLog.classList.remove('visible');
    statusDot.className = 'status-dot';
    statusText.textContent = 'Rendered';
  }
  preview.innerHTML = html;
}

function processLatex(source, errors) {
  var html = '';
  var lines = source.split('\n');
  var inMathEnv = false;
  var mathBuffer = '';
  var mathEnvType = '';

  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    var line = lines[i];
    var beginMatch = line.match(/\\begin\{(equation\*?|align\*?|gather\*?|multline\*?|displaymath|math)\}/);
    if (beginMatch && !inMathEnv) {
      inMathEnv = true;
      mathEnvType = beginMatch[1];
      mathBuffer = line.replace(/\\begin\{[^}]+\}/, '');
      continue;
    }
    var endMatch = line.match(/\\end\{(equation\*?|align\*?|gather\*?|multline\*?|displaymath|math)\}/);
    if (endMatch && inMathEnv) {
      mathBuffer += '\n' + line.replace(/\\end\{[^}]+\}/, '');
      html += renderMathBlock(mathBuffer.trim(), mathEnvType, errors);
      inMathEnv = false;
      mathBuffer = '';
      continue;
    }
    if (inMathEnv) { mathBuffer += '\n' + line; continue; }
    html += processLine(line, errors);
  }
  if (inMathEnv) {
    errors.push('Unclosed \\begin{' + mathEnvType + '} environment');
    html += renderMathBlock(mathBuffer.trim(), mathEnvType, errors);
  }
  return html;
}

function processLine(line, errors) {
  if (line.trim() === '') return '<br>';
  if (line.match(/^\\section\*?\{/)) {
    var title = line.replace(/\\section\*?\{([^}]*)\}/, '$1');
    return '<h2 style="margin:1em 0 0.5em;border-bottom:1px solid #eee;padding-bottom:4px;">' + escapeHtml(title) + '</h2>';
  }
  if (line.match(/^\\subsection\*?\{/)) {
    var title = line.replace(/\\subsection\*?\{([^}]*)\}/, '$1');
    return '<h3 style="margin:0.8em 0 0.4em;">' + escapeHtml(title) + '</h3>';
  }
  if (line.match(/^\\subsubsection\*?\{/)) {
    var title = line.replace(/\\subsubsection\*?\{([^}]*)\}/, '$1');
    return '<h4 style="margin:0.6em 0 0.3em;">' + escapeHtml(title) + '</h4>';
  }
  if (line.match(/^\\title\{/)) {
    var t = line.replace(/\\title\{([^}]*)\}/, '$1');
    return '<h1 style="text-align:center;margin:0.5em 0 0.2em;">' + escapeHtml(t) + '</h1>';
  }
  if (line.match(/^\\author\{/)) {
    var a = line.replace(/\\author\{([^}]*)\}/, '$1');
    return '<p style="text-align:center;font-size:1.1rem;color:#555;">' + escapeHtml(a) + '</p>';
  }
  if (line.match(/^\\date\{/)) {
    var d = line.replace(/\\date\{([^}]*)\}/, '$1');
    return '<p style="text-align:center;color:#777;font-size:0.9rem;">' + escapeHtml(d) + '</p>';
  }
  if (line.match(/^\\maketitle/)) return '';
  if (line.match(/^\\(documentclass|usepackage|begin\{document\}|end\{document\}|newcommand|renewcommand|setlength|pagestyle)/)) return '';
  if (line.match(/^\\(hrule|noindent\\rule)/)) return '<hr style="margin:1em 0;">';

  var displayMatch = line.match(/^\$\$(.*)\$\$$/);
  if (displayMatch) return renderMathBlock(displayMatch[1], 'displaymath', errors);
  var displayMatch2 = line.match(/^\\\[(.*)\\\]$/);
  if (displayMatch2) return renderMathBlock(displayMatch2[1], 'displaymath', errors);

  if (line.match(/^\\item/)) {
    var content = line.replace(/^\\item\s*(\[.*?\])?\s*/, '');
    return '<li style="margin:4px 0;margin-left:20px;">' + processInline(content, errors) + '</li>';
  }
  if (line.match(/^\\begin\{(itemize|enumerate)\}/)) return '<ul style="margin:0.5em 0;">';
  if (line.match(/^\\end\{(itemize|enumerate)\}/)) return '</ul>';

  var thmMatch = line.match(/^\\begin\{(theorem|lemma|proposition|corollary|definition|example|remark|proof)\}/);
  if (thmMatch) {
    var label = thmMatch[1].charAt(0).toUpperCase() + thmMatch[1].slice(1);
    return '<div style="margin:1em 0;padding:12px 16px;border-left:4px solid #22176F;background:#f8f6ff;border-radius:0 8px 8px 0;"><strong>' + label + '.</strong> ';
  }
  if (line.match(/^\\end\{(theorem|lemma|proposition|corollary|definition|example|remark|proof)\}/)) return '</div>';

  return '<p style="margin:0.3em 0;">' + processInline(line, errors) + '</p>';
}

function processInline(text, errors) {
  var result = '';
  var parts = text.split(/(\$[^$]+\$)/g);
  for (var i = 0; i < parts.length; i++) {
    var part = parts[i];
    if (part.startsWith('$') && part.endsWith('$') && part.length > 2) {
      try {
        result += katex.renderToString(part.slice(1, -1), { throwOnError: false, displayMode: false });
      } catch(e) {
        errors.push('Inline math error: ' + e.message);
        result += '<span style="color:red;">' + escapeHtml(part) + '</span>';
      }
    } else {
      result += processTextFormatting(part);
    }
  }
  return result;
}

function processTextFormatting(text) {
  text = text.replace(/\\textbf\{([^}]*)\}/g, '<strong>$1</strong>');
  text = text.replace(/\\textit\{([^}]*)\}/g, '<em>$1</em>');
  text = text.replace(/\\underline\{([^}]*)\}/g, '<u>$1</u>');
  text = text.replace(/\\texttt\{([^}]*)\}/g, '<code>$1</code>');
  text = text.replace(/\\emph\{([^}]*)\}/g, '<em>$1</em>');
  text = text.replace(/\\text\{([^}]*)\}/g, '$1');
  text = text.replace(/\\textsc\{([^}]*)\}/g, '<span style="font-variant:small-caps;">$1</span>');
  text = text.replace(/\\href\{([^}]*)\}\{([^}]*)\}/g, '<a href="$1">$2</a>');
  text = text.replace(/\\url\{([^}]*)\}/g, '<a href="$1">$1</a>');
  text = text.replace(/\\footnote\{([^}]*)\}/g, '<sup style="color:#22176F;" title="$1">[*]</sup>');
  text = text.replace(/\\label\{[^}]*\}/g, '');
  text = text.replace(/\\ref\{([^}]*)\}/g, '<span style="color:#22176F;">[ref:$1]</span>');
  text = text.replace(/---/g, '—');
  text = text.replace(/--/g, '–');
  text = text.replace(/``/g, '\u201C');
  text = text.replace(/''/g, '\u201D');
  text = text.replace(/~/g, '&nbsp;');
  text = text.replace(/\\\\/g, '<br>');
  text = text.replace(/\\quad/g, '&emsp;');
  text = text.replace(/\\qquad/g, '&emsp;&emsp;');
  return text;
}

function renderMathBlock(content, envType, errors) {
  if (!content.trim()) return '';
  try {
    var processed = content;
    if (envType.startsWith('align')) processed = processed.replace(/&/g, '\\quad ');
    var rendered = katex.renderToString(processed, { displayMode: true, throwOnError: false });
    return '<div style="margin:1em 0;text-align:center;overflow-x:auto;">' + rendered + '</div>';
  } catch(e) {
    errors.push('Math error in ' + envType + ': ' + e.message);
    return '<div style="margin:1em 0;text-align:center;color:red;">' + escapeHtml(content) + '</div>';
  }
}

function escapeHtml(text) {
  var d = document.createElement('div');
  d.textContent = text;
  return d.innerHTML;
}

// === Symbol palette ===
var symbolCategories = {
  'Greek': [
    ['\u03B1','\\alpha'],['\u03B2','\\beta'],['\u03B3','\\gamma'],['\u03B4','\\delta'],['\u03B5','\\epsilon'],
    ['\u03B6','\\zeta'],['\u03B7','\\eta'],['\u03B8','\\theta'],['\u03B9','\\iota'],['\u03BA','\\kappa'],
    ['\u03BB','\\lambda'],['\u03BC','\\mu'],['\u03BD','\\nu'],['\u03BE','\\xi'],['\u03C0','\\pi'],
    ['\u03C1','\\rho'],['\u03C3','\\sigma'],['\u03C4','\\tau'],['\u03C5','\\upsilon'],['\u03C6','\\phi'],
    ['\u03C7','\\chi'],['\u03C8','\\psi'],['\u03C9','\\omega'],
    ['\u0393','\\Gamma'],['\u0394','\\Delta'],['\u0398','\\Theta'],['\u039B','\\Lambda'],['\u039E','\\Xi'],
    ['\u03A0','\\Pi'],['\u03A3','\\Sigma'],['\u03A6','\\Phi'],['\u03A8','\\Psi'],['\u03A9','\\Omega']
  ],
  'Operators': [
    ['\u00B1','\\pm'],['\u2213','\\mp'],['\u00D7','\\times'],['\u00F7','\\div'],['\u00B7','\\cdot'],
    ['\u2218','\\circ'],['\u2295','\\oplus'],['\u2297','\\otimes'],['\u2296','\\ominus'],
    ['\u2264','\\leq'],['\u2265','\\geq'],['\u226A','\\ll'],['\u226B','\\gg'],
    ['\u2260','\\neq'],['\u2248','\\approx'],['\u2261','\\equiv'],['\u221D','\\propto'],
    ['\u227A','\\prec'],['\u227B','\\succ'],['\u223C','\\sim'],['\u2243','\\simeq']
  ],
  'Arrows': [
    ['\u2190','\\leftarrow'],['\u2192','\\rightarrow'],['\u2191','\\uparrow'],['\u2193','\\downarrow'],
    ['\u2194','\\leftrightarrow'],['\u21D0','\\Leftarrow'],['\u21D2','\\Rightarrow'],['\u21D4','\\Leftrightarrow'],
    ['\u21A6','\\mapsto'],['\u27F6','\\longrightarrow'],['\u27F5','\\longleftarrow'],
    ['\u2197','\\nearrow'],['\u2198','\\searrow'],['\u2199','\\swarrow'],['\u2196','\\nwarrow'],
    ['\u27F9','\\Longrightarrow'],['\u27F8','\\Longleftarrow']
  ],
  'Sets & Logic': [
    ['\u2208','\\in'],['\u2209','\\notin'],['\u2282','\\subset'],['\u2283','\\supset'],['\u2286','\\subseteq'],['\u2287','\\supseteq'],
    ['\u222A','\\cup'],['\u2229','\\cap'],['\u2205','\\emptyset'],['\u2200','\\forall'],['\u2203','\\exists'],['\u00AC','\\neg'],
    ['\u2227','\\land'],['\u2228','\\lor'],['\u22A2','\\vdash'],['\u22A8','\\models'],
    ['\u2115','\\mathbb{N}'],['\u2124','\\mathbb{Z}'],['\u211A','\\mathbb{Q}'],['\u211D','\\mathbb{R}'],['\u2102','\\mathbb{C}']
  ],
  'Calculus': [
    ['\u222B','\\int'],['\u222C','\\iint'],['\u222D','\\iiint'],['\u222E','\\oint'],
    ['\u2211','\\sum'],['\u220F','\\prod'],['\u2202','\\partial'],['\u2207','\\nabla'],
    ['\u221E','\\infty'],['lim','\\lim'],['sup','\\sup'],['inf','\\inf'],
    ['d/dx','\\frac{d}{dx}'],['dx','\\,dx'],['dy','\\,dy'],['dt','\\,dt']
  ],
  'Accents & Fonts': [
    ['hat','\\hat{}'],['\u0304','\\bar{}'],['\u0303','\\tilde{}'],['\u20D7','\\vec{}'],
    ['dot','\\dot{}'],['ddot','\\ddot{}'],['bb','\\mathbb{}'],['cal','\\mathcal{}'],
    ['frak','\\mathfrak{}'],['rm','\\mathrm{}'],['bf','\\mathbf{}'],['sf','\\mathsf{}']
  ],
  'Structures': [
    ['frac','\\frac{}{}'],['\u221A','\\sqrt{}'],['^n\u221A','\\sqrt[n]{}'],
    ['binom','\\binom{n}{k}'],['overset','\\overset{}{}'],
    ['matrix','\\begin{bmatrix}\n  \n\\end{bmatrix}'],
    ['cases','\\begin{cases}\n  \n\\end{cases}'],
    ['align','\\begin{align}\n  \n\\end{align}'],
    ['text','\\text{}'],['\u25A1','\\boxed{}'],['cancel','\\cancel{}']
  ]
};

function buildSymbolPalette() {
  var tabsEl = document.getElementById('symbol-tabs');
  var cats = Object.keys(symbolCategories);
  cats.forEach(function(cat, idx) {
    var tab = document.createElement('button');
    tab.className = 'symbol-tab' + (idx === 0 ? ' active' : '');
    tab.textContent = cat;
    tab.onclick = function() {
      document.querySelectorAll('.symbol-tab').forEach(function(t) { t.classList.remove('active'); });
      tab.classList.add('active');
      showSymbols(cat);
    };
    tabsEl.appendChild(tab);
  });
  showSymbols(cats[0]);
}

function showSymbols(category) {
  var gridEl = document.getElementById('symbol-grid');
  gridEl.innerHTML = '';
  symbolCategories[category].forEach(function(sym) {
    var btn = document.createElement('button');
    btn.className = 'symbol-btn';
    btn.setAttribute('data-tooltip', sym[1]);
    btn.innerHTML = '<span>' + sym[0] + '</span><span class="sym-label">' + sym[1] + '</span>';
    btn.onclick = function() {
      if (!cm) return;
      cm.replaceSelection(sym[1]);
      cm.focus();
      setTimeout(renderPreview, 50);
    };
    gridEl.appendChild(btn);
  });
}

// === Templates ===
var templates = [
  { name: 'Article', desc: 'Standard academic article with sections',
    content: '\\title{My Article}\n\\author{Author Name}\n\\date{\\today}\n\\maketitle\n\n\\section{Introduction}\nThis is the introduction. We study $x^2 + y^2 = z^2$.\n\n\\section{Methods}\n$$\\mathcal{L}(\\theta) = -\\sum_{i=1}^{n} \\log p(x_i | \\theta)$$\n\n\\section{Results}\n\\begin{align}\nf(x) &= x^2 + 2x + 1 \\\\\n&= (x + 1)^2\n\\end{align}\n\n\\section{Conclusion}\nWe have shown that $f(x) \\geq 0$ for all $x \\in \\mathbb{R}$.' },
  { name: 'Homework', desc: 'Problem set with exercises',
    content: '\\title{Problem Set 3}\n\\author{Student Name}\n\\date{Due: October 15}\n\\maketitle\n\n\\section{Problem 1}\nProve that $\\sqrt{2}$ is irrational.\n\n\\textbf{Proof.} Suppose $\\sqrt{2} = \\frac{p}{q}$ with $\\gcd(p,q) = 1$.\nThen $2q^2 = p^2$, so $p$ is even. Write $p = 2k$, giving $q^2 = 2k^2$.\nThus $q$ is also even, contradicting $\\gcd(p,q) = 1$. $\\square$\n\n\\section{Problem 2}\n$$\\int_0^1 \\frac{\\ln(1+x)}{x} \\, dx = \\frac{\\pi^2}{12}$$' },
  { name: 'Theorem', desc: 'Formal theorem with proof',
    content: '\\section{Main Result}\n\n\\begin{theorem}\nLet $f: [a,b] \\to \\mathbb{R}$ be continuous. Then $f$ attains its maximum and minimum on $[a,b]$.\n\\end{theorem}\n\n\\begin{proof}\nSince $[a,b]$ is compact and $f$ is continuous, $f([a,b])$ is compact.\nBy Heine-Borel, it is closed and bounded, so extrema exist and are attained.\n\\end{proof}\n\n\\begin{corollary}\nEvery continuous function on a closed interval is bounded.\n\\end{corollary}' },
  { name: 'Linear Algebra', desc: 'Matrices and vector spaces',
    content: '\\section{Linear Transformations}\n\nConsider $T: \\mathbb{R}^3 \\to \\mathbb{R}^2$ given by:\n$$T(\\mathbf{x}) = A\\mathbf{x}, \\quad A = \\begin{bmatrix} 1 & 2 & 3 \\\\ 4 & 5 & 6 \\end{bmatrix}$$\n\nThe null space: $\\ker(T) = \\{\\mathbf{x} \\in \\mathbb{R}^3 : A\\mathbf{x} = \\mathbf{0}\\}$\n\nRank-nullity: $\\dim(\\ker T) + \\dim(\\text{im } T) = 3$' },
  { name: 'Physics', desc: 'Physics equations',
    content: '\\title{Classical Mechanics}\n\\maketitle\n\n\\section{Lagrangian}\n$$\\mathcal{L} = T - V = \\frac{1}{2}m\\dot{q}^2 - V(q)$$\n\nEuler-Lagrange:\n$$\\frac{d}{dt}\\frac{\\partial \\mathcal{L}}{\\partial \\dot{q}} - \\frac{\\partial \\mathcal{L}}{\\partial q} = 0$$\n\n\\section{Hamilton}\n$$H = \\sum_i p_i \\dot{q}_i - \\mathcal{L}$$\n\n\\begin{align}\n\\dot{q}_i &= \\frac{\\partial H}{\\partial p_i} \\\\\n\\dot{p}_i &= -\\frac{\\partial H}{\\partial q_i}\n\\end{align}' },
  { name: 'Statistics', desc: 'Probability and stats',
    content: '\\section{Normal Distribution}\n$$f(x) = \\frac{1}{\\sigma\\sqrt{2\\pi}} \\exp\\left(-\\frac{(x-\\mu)^2}{2\\sigma^2}\\right)$$\n\n\\section{MLE}\n$$\\hat{\\theta}_{\\text{MLE}} = \\arg\\max_\\theta \\sum_{i=1}^n \\log f(x_i | \\theta)$$\n\n\\section{Bayes}\n$$P(\\theta | \\mathbf{x}) = \\frac{P(\\mathbf{x} | \\theta) \\cdot P(\\theta)}{P(\\mathbf{x})}$$' },
  { name: 'ML / Neural Nets', desc: 'Machine learning formulas',
    content: '\\title{Neural Networks}\n\\maketitle\n\n\\section{Forward Pass}\n$$f(\\mathbf{x}) = \\sigma(W_L \\cdot \\sigma(\\cdots \\sigma(W_1 \\mathbf{x} + b_1) \\cdots) + b_L)$$\n\n\\section{Loss}\n$$\\mathcal{L} = -\\frac{1}{N}\\sum_{i=1}^N [y_i \\log \\hat{y}_i + (1-y_i)\\log(1-\\hat{y}_i)]$$\n\n\\section{Backprop}\n$$\\frac{\\partial \\mathcal{L}}{\\partial W_l} = \\frac{\\partial \\mathcal{L}}{\\partial a_l} \\cdot \\frac{\\partial a_l}{\\partial W_l}$$' },
  { name: 'Blank', desc: 'Empty document',
    content: '\\title{Document Title}\n\\author{Your Name}\n\\maketitle\n\n\\section{Introduction}\n\nInline math: $x = \\frac{-b \\pm \\sqrt{b^2 - 4ac}}{2a}$\n\nDisplay math:\n$$\\int_a^b f(x) \\, dx = F(b) - F(a)$$' }
];

function buildTemplates() {
  var grid = document.getElementById('templates-grid');
  templates.forEach(function(tpl) {
    var card = document.createElement('div');
    card.className = 'template-card';
    card.innerHTML = '<h4>' + tpl.name + '</h4><p>' + tpl.desc + '</p>';
    card.onclick = function() {
      cm.setValue(tpl.content);
      renderPreview();
      updateStatus();
      document.getElementById('templates-panel').classList.remove('visible');
      document.getElementById('btn-templates').classList.remove('active');
    };
    grid.appendChild(card);
  });
}

// === LocalStorage ===
function saveToStorage() {
  try {
    localStorage.setItem('latex-preview-content', cm.getValue());
    localStorage.setItem('latex-preview-lang', currentLang);
  } catch(e) {}
}

function loadFromStorage() {
  try {
    var saved = localStorage.getItem('latex-preview-content');
    var lang = localStorage.getItem('latex-preview-lang');
    if (lang) {
      currentLang = lang;
      document.getElementById('lang-selector').value = lang;
    }
    return saved || '';
  } catch(e) { return ''; }
}

// === Init ===
(function init() {
  var saved = loadFromStorage();
  var initialContent = saved || '\\title{Hello, LaTeX!}\n\\author{Your Name}\n\\maketitle\n\n\\section{Introduction}\nWelcome to the LaTeX Preview tool. Type here and see it rendered live.\n\nInline math: $E = mc^2$\n\nDisplay math:\n$$\\int_0^\\infty e^{-x^2}\\,dx = \\frac{\\sqrt{\\pi}}{2}$$\n\n\\section{Features}\n\\begin{itemize}\n\\item Syntax highlighting (CodeMirror)\n\\item Auto language detection\n\\item Resizable panes --- drag the middle handle\n\\item Symbol palette and templates\n\\item Export to PNG, SVG, PDF, HTML\n\\end{itemize}';

  // Auto-detect language from content
  if (saved) {
    var detected = detectLanguage(saved);
    if (!localStorage.getItem('latex-preview-lang')) {
      currentLang = detected;
      document.getElementById('lang-selector').value = detected;
    }
  }

  initEditor(initialContent);
  buildSymbolPalette();
  buildTemplates();
  setTimeout(function() { renderPreview(); updateStatus(); }, 300);
})();
</script>
```
